prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to an environmental permit application under the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations 2016, which does not apply to Scotland. Scotland has its own regulatory framework for environmental permits, governed by the Environmental Protection Act and Scottish Environment Protection Agency guidelines.
